content: The 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory framework can be restructured to prioritize 'memory uncertainty' rather than just observation uncertainty, creating a closed-loop self-improving system where the agent actively selects which of its own stored memories to rehearse and refine via self-supervised learning. This creates an autonomous agent that does not just collect new labeled data for active learning, but actively curates its own long-term memory to reduce persistent cognitive errors that self-supervised pre-training alone cannot resolve.
